label: scam
text: This is Inspector Sharma from the Cyber Crime Branch. A money-laundering case is registered against your Aadhaar. You are under digital arrest. Stay on this video call, do not disconnect, and do not inform anyone until the investigation is complete.

label: scam
text: Calling from the courier customs department. A parcel booked under your name and Aadhaar has been seized containing illegal drugs and fake passports. I am connecting you to the narcotics officer. Do not hang up, this is now a legal matter.

label: scam
text: Sir main aapke bank se bol raha hoon, aapka KYC aaj expire ho raha hai aur account block ho jayega. Main ek link bhej raha hoon, usme apna account number, debit card number aur CVV daal dijiye turant.

label: scam
text: Dear customer, your electricity will be disconnected tonight at 9:30 because your previous bill was not updated. To stop disconnection please call our officer immediately on the number in this message.

label: scam
text: This is TRAI. Your mobile number has been used in illegal activities and will be deactivated in two hours. To keep your number active, press one to connect to the cyber cell officer handling your case.

label: scam
text: You took a loan on our app and the payment is overdue. Pay right now or we will send a message to everyone in your contact list with your photo saying you are a fraud and a thief. This is your last warning.

label: scam
text: I have a recording of you from the video call last night. Send five thousand rupees to this UPI in the next thirty minutes or I will send the video to your family and post it online.

label: scam
source_note: task-based part-time job to investment scam
text: Congratulations, you are selected for an online part-time job. Just like these YouTube videos and earn one fifty per task, paid instantly. Complete a prepaid task now for a bigger reward and higher commission.

label: scam
text: Sir aapka bijli bill payment fail ho gaya lekin paisa cut gaya. Refund ke liye main aapke phone par ek request bhej raha hoon, use accept karke apna UPI pin daal dijiye, paisa turant wapas aa jayega.

label: scam
text: Aap ko KBC lucky draw me pachchees lakh rupaye ki lottery lagi hai. Sirf ek refundable processing fee aur GST bharna hoga, phir puri rakam aap ke account me transfer ho jayegi. Jaldi kijiye offer aaj tak hai.

label: scam
text: I am calling from technical support about a problem detected on your bank account. To fix it, please install the AnyDesk application and share the nine-digit code with me so I can access your phone and secure it.

label: scam
text: Sir I am an army officer posted at the border and I want to buy your item urgently. I cannot come in person. I am sending a QR code, please scan it to receive the advance payment in your account.

label: scam
text: I really enjoy talking with you every day. I have been making good profit on a trusted crypto platform and I want to help you too. Start with a small amount, you will see the returns in your own wallet in two days, no pressure at all.

label: scam
text: Sir your insurance policy has lapsed and the accumulated bonus of two lakh eighty thousand will be forfeited this week. I can protect it for you today, you only need to pay the revival premium into the settlement account I share now.

label: scam
text: Hum police station se bol rahe hain, aapka beta ek accident aur ladai ke case me pakda gaya hai. Abhi settlement ke liye paise bhej dijiye is number par, warna FIR ho jayegi. Kisi ko mat bataiye, jaldi kijiye.

label: scam
text: मैं सीबीआई से बोल रहा हूँ। आपके आधार पर एक पार्सल पकड़ा गया है जिसमें ड्रग्स हैं। यह गोपनीय जांच है, किसी को मत बताइए, कैमरा चालू रखिए और जांच खाते में पैसे ट्रांसफर कीजिए।

label: scam
text: This is your gas agency. Your connection subsidy will stop unless you update your KYC today. Please share the OTP we just sent so we can link your Aadhaar and continue your subsidy.

label: scam
text: This is the fraud department of your bank. We noticed a suspicious transaction and to block it I need you to confirm your card number, expiry and the OTP I am about to send. Please be quick or the money will be gone.

label: scam
text: Your resume is shortlisted for a high-salary job in Dubai. To confirm your visa and ticket processing, please pay the refundable registration and documentation charge today before the seat is given to another candidate.

label: scam
text: Beta main tumhare papa ka dost hoon, wo meeting me hain. Ek payment atak gaya hai, tum bas wo message padh kar suna do jo abhi tumhare phone par aaya hai, papa pareshan ho rahe hain.

label: scam
text: This is an officer from the Enforcement Directorate. Suspicious transactions linked to a criminal network were found in your account. An arrest team will reach you within twenty-four hours unless you cooperate and move your funds to the government verification account.

label: scam
text: Customs se baat kar raha hoon, aapke naam ka ek courier Taiwan ja raha tha jisme banned items aur passports mile hain. Aapke naam par case ban gaya hai, main aapko narcotics officer se connect kar raha hoon, phone mat kaatiye.

label: scam
text: This is the Amazon security team. An order for a ninety-thousand rupee phone is being shipped from your account right now. If you did not place it, stay on the line and I will help you cancel it through a secure verification.

label: scam
text: Sir your credit card reward points worth twelve thousand are expiring today. To redeem them and upgrade your limit for free, please confirm your card number, CVV and the code I will send to your phone.

label: scam
text: Namaste, bijli vibhag se hoon. Aapka pichhla bill update nahi hua isliye aaj raat aapki bijli kaat di jayegi. Bachne ke liye turant hamare officer ko is number par whatsapp kijiye, wo process kara denge.

label: scam
text: I am calling from the court. A summons has been issued against you for an online fraud transaction. If you want to settle it, pay the fine right now, otherwise the police will arrest you at your home tomorrow morning.

label: scam
text: Aapko ghar baithe kamane ka mauka mil raha hai. Pehle do task free me, phir ek prepaid task kariye jisme aap double return payenge. Bas thoda invest karna hoga, profit turant wallet me dikhega.

label: scam
text: Maine kal raat ki video call record kar li hai. Agar nahi chahte ki main ye video aapke ghar walon aur dosto ko bhej doon, to abhi is UPI par das hazaar bhej do, ek ghante ke andar.

label: scam
text: I am from Paytm customer care. Your wallet KYC has failed and your account is frozen. Download the assistance app I am sending and share your screen so I can complete the verification and unfreeze it for you.

label: scam
text: Bhaiya maine galti se aapke account me aath hazaar bhej diye hain, please check karke wapas kar dijiye, meri mummy hospital me hain. Bas ek chhoti si request accept kar lijiye jo aa rahi hai, paisa wapas ho jayega.

label: scam
text: You are speaking with the Mumbai police cyber cell. Your bank account is linked to a human trafficking investigation. Keep your camera on at all times, do not contact a lawyer or your family, and transfer your savings to the safe account for verification.

label: scam
text: Congratulations! You have won a special festival cashback of five thousand rupees. Click the link below and complete a quick verification with your bank details to receive the amount instantly in your account.

label: scam
text: Your personal loan of five lakh is pre-approved at very low interest. Because your credit score is slightly low, you only need to pay a one-time file processing and insurance charge today, which is adjusted in your first EMI. Shall I proceed?

label: scam
text: Sir main aapke mobile operator ki verification team se hoon. Aapka SIM 24 ghante me band ho jayega kyunki KYC pending hai. Number chalu rakhne ke liye main aapko ek chhoti app install karne me guide karta hoon, bas paanch minute.

label: scam
text: You called our customer care about your failed transaction. To process your refund I just need you to install a screen-sharing app and tell me the code, then confirm the small test amount you see in your account.

label: scam
text: Main income tax department se bol raha hoon, supreme court ke order ke saath. Aapke PAN ka galat istemal hua hai, non-bailable warrant nikla hai. Kisi ko mat bataiye, anydesk app install karke apne accounts verify karvaiye aur OTP taiyar rakhiye.

label: scam
text: Your electricity connection shows a pending amount and will be cut today. To pay safely I will guide you to install a quick app and share the screen so I can complete the payment for you. Please do it now to avoid disconnection.

label: scam
text: Hello, this is the safety team at your bank, and I want to be clear I will never ask for your PIN. We just noticed a login from another city and I need to secure your profile. Please stay on the line and follow the steps I read out in your app.

label: scam
text: This message is from your child's school accounts office. The term fee link has changed. Please pay today using the new link we sent on WhatsApp to avoid a late penalty and to keep your child's admission active.

label: scam
text: Aapka Aadhaar ek sandigdh account se link ho gaya hai aur RBI aapka account freeze karne wala hai. Bachne ke liye apni details verify kariye aur jo OTP aaye wo mujhe bata dijiye, taaki main aapka account surakshit kar sakoon.

label: scam
text: We saw your profile and selected you for a work-from-home data entry job paying twenty-five thousand a month. There is a small refundable registration deposit to confirm your seat. Pay today and your kit will be activated within an hour.

label: scam
text: Your international parcel is held at customs and needs a clearance charge to be released. Please pay the small fee to this account now, otherwise the parcel will be returned and a penalty added to your name.

label: scam
text: This is your telecom operator. To upgrade your SIM to 5G for free, please share the twenty-digit number on your SIM and the OTP we send, so we can activate the upgrade on your account today.

label: scam
text: We are collecting urgent donations for flood victims on behalf of a relief fund. Every rupee helps a family tonight. Please send whatever you can to this UPI id now, and forward this message to ten people to multiply the help.

label: scam
text: Madam, this is the customs office. A courier with your identity contained a controlled substance. You are under digital custody and must report on video every hour. Any disclosure is a crime. Move your fixed deposit to the RBI account until your name is cleared.

label: scam
text: We processed your refund but accidentally sent ninety thousand instead of nine thousand. Please return the extra amount immediately to this account, or a case will be filed against you for keeping money that is not yours.

label: benign
text: Hello, this is the delivery executive. I am near your building with your parcel but the gate is locked. Could you tell me the flat number? It is prepaid, so there is nothing to collect.

label: benign
source_note: genuine bank fraud desk refusing creds
text: This is the fraud monitoring desk at your bank. We blocked an unusual card transaction of forty thousand. We will never ask for your PIN or OTP. If it was not you, please call the number on the back of your card or visit a branch.

label: benign
text: Namaste, main Dr. Mehta ke clinic se bol rahi hoon. Aapka appointment kal paanch baje tha, doctor ko emergency aa gayi hai, kya hum use parso gyaarah baje kar sakte hain?

label: benign
text: Namaste, aapke loan ki EMI kal due hai, kripya samay par payment kar dijiye. Yah aapke registered bank se ek reminder hai, koi jaldi nahi, dhanyavaad.

label: benign
text: Your OTP for the Flipkart order is 4471. Do not share it with anyone. This is an automated message, please do not reply.

label: benign
text: This is the school office. The parent teacher meeting is on Saturday morning at ten. Kindly confirm your attendance so we can plan the schedule. Thank you.

label: benign
text: Hi, this is HR. Your background verification is complete and we will email your offer letter today. There is no fee at any stage of our process. Congratulations and welcome to the team.

label: benign
text: This is the passport verification officer from the local police station. I need to visit your address to verify your details for your passport application. When are you usually at home this week?

label: benign
text: This is your electricity provider's customer care. Our records show your last bill was paid successfully on the fifth, so please ignore any earlier reminder. There is no pending amount. Have a good day.

label: benign
text: Bhaiya main courier wala hoon, aapka cash on delivery parcel hai, chaar sau ninyanve rupaye hain. Main gate par hoon, aap aaram se aa jaiye jab time ho.

label: benign
text: Dear employee, your salary for this month has been credited to your registered bank account. Please check your payslip on the portal. This is an automated notification, no action needed.

label: benign
text: Sir main society ka secretary bol raha hoon, is mahine ka maintenance pending hai. Aap online ya cash kisi bhi tarah kar sakte ho, koi jaldi nahi, jab suvidha ho.

label: benign
text: This is a reminder that your health insurance renewal is due this month. You can renew on the official portal or app at your convenience. No payment is taken over this call. Thank you.

label: benign
text: Hello, calling from the clinic. Your blood test payment of twelve hundred was received and your reports will be ready by tomorrow evening. You can collect them or download them from the portal.

label: benign
text: This is your bank confirming that you successfully updated your registered mobile number today. If this was you, no action is needed. If it was not, please visit your nearest branch.

label: benign
text: Hi, I am the delivery partner with your food order. I am at the main gate and the security is not allowing entry. Could you please come down or tell the guard? Your order is getting cold.

label: benign
source_note: genuine witness summons to registered address
text: You are called as a witness in case number forty-five at the district court on the twentieth. An official summons has also been sent to your registered postal address. Please bring a photo identity document.

label: benign
source_note: genuine transaction alert, no creds asked
text: Your credit card was used for a payment of two thousand three hundred at a fuel station. If this was you, ignore this message. If not, call the number printed on your card. We will never ask for your PIN.

label: benign
text: Beta shaam ko ghar jaldi aa jana, mehmaan aa rahe hain, aur aate hue thoda dahi le aana. Papa bhi thodi der me pahunch jayenge. Sab theek hai na?

label: benign
text: This is your bank branch. Your KYC documents are due for a periodic update. Please visit the branch with your ID and address proof at your convenience this month. We do not collect any details over the phone.

label: benign
text: Namaste, gas agency se bol rahe hain, aapka cylinder aaj deliver hoga, delivery boy do baje tak aa jayega. Ghar par koi rahega to accha rahega, dhanyavaad.

label: benign
text: Hello, I am your cab driver. I have reached the pickup point and I am waiting near the coffee shop at the gate. Please come whenever you are ready, no hurry, I will wait here.

label: benign
text: Your monthly mobile plan was renewed successfully and is valid till the twenty-eighth. Thank you for staying with us. This is an automated confirmation, no action is required from your side.

label: benign
text: Hello, this is the city library. The two books you borrowed are due for return this Friday. You can return or renew them online or at the counter. There is a small fine only if they are late.

label: benign
text: Namaste, agle mahine bete ki shaadi hai, aap sabhi ko sapariwar aana hai. Card bhej rahe hain, lekin pehle phone par khud invite karna chahte the. Zaroor aaiyega.

label: benign
text: This is an informational message: you have reward points on your credit card that you can redeem anytime on the official app under the rewards section. No action is needed and we will not ask for any details.

label: benign
text: Good morning, this is the dental clinic confirming your appointment on Monday at four in the afternoon. Please carry your previous prescription if you have one. Reply or call if you need to reschedule.

label: benign
text: Bhaiya aapka ek courier aaya tha jab aap ghar par nahi the, maine security se le liya hai, mere ghar se le jaiyega jab time mile. Koi baat nahi, jaldi nahi hai.

label: benign
text: Hello, calling from the HR team about your interview. We would like to move your second round to Thursday afternoon. There is no fee at any stage. Please confirm if the new time works for you.

label: benign
text: This is your bank. Your fixed deposit matures on the fifteenth. You may visit the branch anytime to renew it or let it auto-renew as per your instruction. No details are needed over the phone.

label: benign
text: Hello, I am the meter reader from the electricity board. I will visit your area tomorrow morning to note the reading. If your meter is inside, please keep it accessible or leave the reading with the guard.

label: benign
text: This is your pharmacy. The medicines on your monthly prescription are ready for pickup, or we can deliver them tomorrow. Please let us know what suits you. Payment can be made on delivery.

label: benign
text: Dear customer, your monthly account statement is now available in your net banking and mobile app. This is an automated message. For any query, use the contact details printed on your passbook.

label: benign
text: Hello, this is the college office. Your semester results are published on the student portal and the marksheet can be collected from the desk next week. Please carry your ID card. Congratulations on passing.

label: benign
text: Hello, confirming your table reservation for four people tonight at eight. We have noted the window seat you requested. Please call if your plans change. Looking forward to hosting you.
